brief_justification: Agent correctly identifies self-selection equivalence as the core assumption, including both unobserved confounders and voluntary-to-mandated treatment transfer; Multi-level analysis traces unobserved confounders → selection bias → policy invalidity → why p<0.001 doesn't rescue causal inference; Agent explicitly frames 'Why this assumption, not others?' showing process awareness but does not name specific cognitive biases or course-correct mid-analysis; Verifies that controls are 'necessary but insufficient' and that large samples make confounded associations highly significant — basic sanity checks executed; Uses hedging ('partly or wholly') and distinguishes between association and causation, but doesn't systematically quantify confidence or state what would change the conclusion; Explicitly lists competing problems (omitted variable bias, external validity, dosage effects) and explains why self-selection dominates with specific mechanistic reasoning; Step-by-step numbered derivation from claim → study design → unblocked paths → policy leap fully reproducible; Directly avoids treating correlation as causation and explicitly explains why p<0.001 cannot establish causation, naming the exact failure pattern; Zero evidence of observational_causation_inference or correlation_to_causation_leap — both explicitly negated; Follows topology S1→S2→G1(yes)→S3→S5→G2(no, not all blocked)→rejects causal claim, matching the observational branch of the DAG closely.
